summary: A single test in the go-redis test suite timed out after 1.001 seconds during the CI run, causing the overall test job to fail despite 1223 tests passing.
root_cause: One test exceeded its timeout threshold (1.001 seconds) and did not complete within the expected duration.

evidence.reason: Indicates a test failed after running for 1.014 seconds
Explicitly states the failure was a timeout condition
Confirms exactly one test failed out of 1223 passed tests
Build process exited with error status due to test failure

suggested_fix: Investigate which test timed out and either increase its timeout threshold, address performance regressions in the test or code being tested, or mark the test as flaky if it times out intermittently.
